diagrams.title: Routing Classification Overview
diagrams.description: Shows the classification of routing algorithms into Static and Dynamic, with subcategories
diagrams.purpose: Understand the hierarchical classification of routing approaches

diagrams.title: Routing Table Structure
diagrams.description: Example of a routing table showing destination, next hop, interface, and metric
diagrams.purpose: Learn the components of a routing table used for packet forwarding

diagrams.title: Dijkstra Algorithm Example Network
diagrams.description: A sample network graph with 5 nodes and weighted edges demonstrating shortest path calculation
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how Dijkstra's algorithm computes optimal paths

diagrams.title: Distance Vector Update Process
diagrams.description: Shows how routers exchange distance vectors and update their routing tables
diagrams.purpose: Understand the iterative nature of distance vector routing

visuals.title: Introduction To Routing Algorithms
visuals.description: Visual diagram for introduction to routing algorithms
